note: AEO Loop daily Instagram — carousels/cards, 18:00 ET.

posts.caption:
3 signs AI is quietly skipping your practice 👇

When a patient asks ChatGPT or Gemini who the best surgeon in their city is, it hands them a short list. If you're not on it, you're invisible — and most practices have no idea.

Comment "SCAN" for a free check across 4 AI engines.

#plasticsurgeon #aisearch #chatgpt #medspa #medicalmarketing #theaeoloop
posts.firstComment: There's no page two in an AI answer — you're named or you're invisible. The good news: it's fixable, and it's not about your skill.
